title: Reconcile investment account — value has grown
objective: Verify that a positive discrepancy on an Investment account creates a Revaluation (gain) transaction visible in the timeline

steps.step: Ensure Investment account recorded balance = 5000 (original deposit)
Open Reconciliation for 'Investments', enter actual balance = 5430 (market value today)
System shows 'Create Revaluation (+430 gain)', tap Create

steps.expected_result: A 'Revaluation (Gain) +430' entry appears, visually distinct from income entries
The +430 revaluation does NOT appear in the income or expense totals
